site.title: Flags & Pole Banners | ION Print & Promo
site.description: Feather flags, teardrop flags, rectangle flags & pole banners for businesses & events. High-impact outdoor signage designed to attract attention.

hero.title: Flags & Pole Banners
hero.imageAlt: Custom flags and pole banners for businesses and events

centreText.title: Simple, Effective & Hard To Miss
centreText.description: If customers don't see you, they won't find you. Flags & pole signage are powerful marketing tools that increase visibility, attract attention & help your business or organization stand out.

featureImage.imageAlt: Custom feather flags and pole banners outdoors

features.title: Outdoor Flags & Signs
features.description:
Flags are a great, eye-catching way to promote your business, event or location! Ideal for storefronts, roadside visibility, car lots, events & seasonal promotions.

  • Feather flags
  • Teardrop flags
  • Rectangle flags
  • Custom branded flags
  • Portable flag systems with weighted bases

They are bright, fun, easy to use & hard to miss.

features.title: Light Post Banners & Pole Signage
features.description:
Turn every pole or light post into a promotion! Light post banners, also known as pole banners, are a high-impact way to promote your brand, event or message across streets, campuses & public spaces.

  • Light post banners & pole banners
  • Double-sided banner options
  • Street & community signage
  • Seasonal & event banner programs

These durable signs are perfect for municipalities, schools, malls, BIAs & organizations looking to create consistent, visible messaging across a larger area.

features.title: Custom & Specialty Signage
features.description:
If you can picture it, we can build it. Not every sign fits a standard category. When you need something unique, the experts here at ION Print & Promo create custom signage solutions.

  • Unique installs & one-off builds
  • Branded display structures
  • Custom-mounted signage
  • Creative large format applications

Built in-house with quality materials & over 20 years of experience behind every project, we'll help bring your custom signage idea to life.
